title: OP Damage Drops
description: A fun and chaotic datapack where every time you take damage, you instantly receive random OP items, gear, loot, and resources!
body:
This datapack makes Minecraft WAY more OP and hilarious — every time you take any damage (fall, mobs, fire, lava, drowning, etc.), the game gives you 2–3 random OP items instantly!

You can get things like:

🛡 Full Netherite Gear (all enchanted)

⚒️ OP Tools (Efficiency V, Fortune III, Unbreaking III)

🧪 Potions & Totems

💎 Diamonds, Emeralds, Netherite Ingots

🔮 Ender Pearls & Blaze Powder

🎒 Elytra, Shulker Boxes, Beacons

⭐ And tons of rare loot (80+ items!)

there is nothing much to tell about it in gallery,you can download it and give it a try once ;)

Everything has equal drop chance, so every hit is a surprise.
Perfect for challenge worlds, SMP chaos, or fun YouTube videos.


✔ No mods required

✔ Works in singleplayer & multiplayer

✔ Lightweight and clean
